summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-29, REQ-30, REQ-31) with good coverage. Multi-level progression, sword weapon, and type extensions are all present. One minor concern: REQ-29 specifies 'more enemies simultaneously' as a possible difficulty scaling mechanism, and LEVEL_CONFIGS shows enemyCount=1 for all 3 levels (only speed/strength/health scale), but the requirement lists this as an example so speed/strength/health scaling is sufficient. All acceptance criteria appear met.
